title: Severe water leak coming from the ceiling in Floor 18 boardroom
description: During the heavy rainstorm, water started gushing out from the ceiling panels in the Floor 18 boardroom. It is dripping directly onto the conference table and video equipment. We need a plumber and buckets immediately.
triage_reason_summary: Water leaks threatening electronics and office property are high-urgency facilities maintenance issues under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Shut off the water valve for the affected ceiling section, move all electronics, and dispatch the building maintenance technician.

title: Air conditioning system not cooling in Floor 19 open office zone
description: The temperature in the engineering zone on Floor 19 is currently 29 degrees Celsius. The AC vents are blowing room-temperature air, and several developers are complaining about the heat. Can you check the chillers?
triage_reason_summary: AC system failure and temperature adjustments fall under the FC001 workplace utilities team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the HVAC control panel settings, inspect the air filter for blockages, and contact the AC technician if chillers are offline.

title: Broken automatic glass door sensor at Floor 19 main entrance
description: The sensor on the automatic sliding door at the Floor 19 main entrance is not responding when someone approaches. The door remains closed, forcing employees to manually pry it open, which might damage the mechanism.
triage_reason_summary: Door lock repairs and sensor troubleshooting fall under FC001 facilities maintenance.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the door sensor wiring, clean the optical lens, and reset the door controller board.

title: Exposed electric wire on Floor 18 floor outlet box
description: The plastic cover on one of the floor power outlets in the developer row has broken off. There are exposed electrical wires coming from the socket box. Someone could step on it and get shocked. Please send an electrician.
triage_reason_summary: Exposed electrical wiring represents a high-risk safety hazard, routing it to FC001 electrical team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Isolate the power circuit breaker for that outlet row immediately, and dispatch an electrician to repair the socket.

title: Rattling noise from ceiling AC unit in Meeting Room 3A
description: There is a very loud, metallic rattling noise coming from the ceiling air conditioning unit in Meeting Room 3A. It is so loud that we cannot hear each other speak during calls. The AC still blows cold air, but it sounds like a loose blade.
triage_reason_summary: AC unit noise and mechanical wear troubleshooting falls under FC001 HVAC maintenance.
triage_recommended_next_action: Open the AC casing in Room 3A, inspect the fan blower wheel and motor mounting screws, and tighten any loose parts.

title: Flickering lights in Floor 19 corridor causing eye strain
description: Two of the fluorescent light panels in the Floor 19 corridor are flickering rapidly. It is very disorienting and is causing headaches for employees sitting nearby. They need to be replaced with new LED tubes.
triage_reason_summary: Office lighting bulb swaps and ballast replacements are managed by FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the flickering fluorescent bulbs with new tubes, and check the light ballast if the flickering persists.

title: Blocked washbasin drain in Floor 18 male restroom
description: The middle washbasin in the Floor 18 restroom is completely blocked. The water does not drain at all and it is starting to smell. We have put an out-of-order note on it, but we need maintenance to clear the clog.
triage_reason_summary: Restroom plumbing clogs and minor repairs are handled by FC001 plumbing maintenance.
triage_recommended_next_action: Use a plunger or plumbing snake to clear the blockage in the restroom sink pipe, and inspect the P-trap.

title: Broken desk adjustment lever on height-adjustable workspace
description: The hand crank lever on my height-adjustable desk has snapped off. The desk is currently locked in a very low position, making it impossible for me to work comfortably. I need someone to fix it or replace the mechanism.
triage_reason_summary: Office furniture maintenance and mechanical repairs are managed under FC001 furniture.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the broken crank arm or adjust the desk manually to a comfortable height while waiting for parts.

title: Coffee stain cleaning request in Floor 18 hallway carpet
description: Someone spilled a large cup of black coffee in the main corridor on Floor 18 right outside the meeting rooms. It has created a dark stain on the gray carpet. We need janitorial staff to deep clean it before it dries.
triage_reason_summary: Janitorial services and carpet spot cleaning requests are handled by FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Dispatch the janitorial team with a carpet extractor machine to clean the coffee stain.

title: Pest control coordination for fruit flies in pantry sink
description: We are noticing a swarm of fruit flies hovering around the organic waste bins and sink drain in the Floor 18 pantry. The bins are emptied daily, but the flies seem to be breeding in the drain. We need sanitation treatment.
triage_reason_summary: Office sanitation and pest control tasks are routed to FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Flush the pantry drain with hot water and enzymatic cleaner, and place fruit fly traps around the bins.

title: Window blind cord snapped in marketing workspace
description: The cord used to adjust the roller blinds on the window in the marketing section has snapped. The blinds are stuck in the down position, blocking all natural light from that corner of the office. We need the cord replaced.
triage_reason_summary: Office window fixtures and minor repairs are handled under FC001 facility maintenance.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the snapped blind cord or install a new roller mechanism on the window frame.

title: Emergency exit sign not illuminated on Floor 19 East wing exit
description: The green backlight on the emergency exit sign at the Floor 19 East fire door is out. The sign is completely dark, which violates local safety regulations and would make it hard to see during an evacuation.
triage_reason_summary: Fire safety lighting and compliance maintenance is routed to FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Open the exit sign casing, replace the backup battery and LED bulbs, and verify its emergency illumination status.

title: Fire extinguisher annual inspection date expired in hallway
description: The fire extinguisher mounted next to the Floor 18 server room door shows an inspection tag that expired last month. We need facilities to verify pressure levels and sign off on a new inspection tag.
triage_reason_summary: Safety equipment checks and compliance reviews are managed under FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the fire extinguisher pressure gauge, sign the inspection record, or swap it for a certified unit.

title: Loose handrail on the central office stairwell between Floor 17 and 18
description: The wooden handrail on the central stairwell is loose at the middle landing. When you hold it, the rail wobbles and feels like it might detatch from the wall bracket. This is a safety hazard for people using the stairs.
triage_reason_summary: Stairwell safety and structural hardware maintenance falls under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send a maintenance worker to tighten the wall brackets and secure the handrail anchors.

title: Pothole repair request for office parking garage entrance lane
description: A deep pothole has formed in the asphalt right at the entrance gate of our parking garage. Cars have to swerve to avoid it, which is causing traffic backups during morning arrival. It needs to be filled with cold patch asphalt.
triage_reason_summary: Parking lot and building exterior tarmac maintenance is handled by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Fill the pothole with rapid-setting asphalt compound, compact it, and verify smooth vehicle transition.

title: Blocked drainage gutter on office rooftop terrace causing pooling
description: During yesterday's rain, the drainage grate on the Floor 19 rooftop terrace got blocked by leaves. There is now a large pool of standing water that is starting to seep under the terrace door frame into the hallway.
triage_reason_summary: Exterior drainage blockages threatening water ingress are handled by FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Clear all leaves and debris from the terrace drainage grate, and check the downspout for internal blockages.

title: Exhaust fan not working in Floor 19 ladies restroom
description: The ventilation exhaust fan in the Floor 19 ladies restroom is not turning on. The restroom has become very humid and stuffy, and the air is stale. We need someone to check the fan switch or fan motor.
triage_reason_summary: Restroom ventilation and exhaust maintenance falls under FC001 building utilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Test the electrical switch for the fan, check the ventilation fan fuse, and replace the motor unit if burnt out.

title: Server room precision AC unit triggering high temperature alarm
description: The secondary precision AC unit in the Floor 18 server room has shut down, showing a 'High pressure limit' alarm. The server rack temperature has reached 25 degrees and is climbing. We need emergency HVAC support.
triage_reason_summary: Server room cooling failures represent a critical infrastructure emergency, mapping to FC001 HVAC team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Deploy backup portable AC units to the server room, open server room ventilation vents, and dispatch the HVAC contractor immediately.

title: Scheduled backup generator testing notification and load check
description: Building management has scheduled the quarterly load testing of our backup diesel generator this Saturday from 1 PM to 4 PM. We need facilities to monitor the automatic transfer switch (ATS) changeover.
triage_reason_summary: Building electrical testing coordination is managed under FC001 electrical utilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Coordinate with building security, check diesel fuel levels, and log the ATS transfer response during the test.

title: Rattling ceiling projector mount in Boardroom A
description: The ceiling mounting bracket for the projector in Boardroom A is loose. Every time the AC turns on, the vibration causes the projector to shake, making the projected screen blurry and dizzying. It needs to be tightened.
triage_reason_summary: Ceiling fixture security and structural tightening is managed by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Access the ceiling bracket using an A-frame ladder, tighten the mounting bolts, and align the projector.

title: Requesting acoustic soundproofing panel installation in phone booth 4
description: The phone booth room 4 has a strong echo. During calls, the acoustic reflection makes it hard for participants to hear clearly. We request installation of some foam soundproofing panels on the walls.
triage_reason_summary: Office interior design modifications and acoustic treatments are routed to FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Order and install adhesive acoustic foam panels on the interior walls of the phone booth.

title: Standing desk motor jammed and won't go down
description: The motorized standing desk in my cubicle is stuck at its maximum height. Pressing the control panel buttons just makes a clicking sound but the desk doesn't move. I cannot work standing up all day.
triage_reason_summary: Mechanical desk motor repairs are handled by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Reset the desk controller unit or replace the jammed lift motor in the desk leg.

title: Partition wall removal request for team collaboration layout
description: Our product team needs to expand our layout. We request the removal of the non-load-bearing drywall partition between cubicles 184 and 185 to create a shared whiteboard collaboration zone next week.
triage_reason_summary: Office layout alterations and drywall removal is managed by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Assess the partition wall wall structure for wiring, get landlord approval, and schedule drywall removal for the weekend.

title: Motion sensor light switch not triggering in Floor 18 archive closet
description: The motion sensor light in the archive storage closet is broken. It does not trigger when you walk in, leaving the room completely dark. I have to use my phone flashlight to search for files.
triage_reason_summary: Electrical sensors and switch maintenance falls under FC001 electrical.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the defective PIR motion sensor switch wall unit in the closet.

title: Testing emergency shower station in chemical testing lab
description: The chemical safety shower in the testing lab is overdue for its quarterly safety inspection. We need facilities to flush the line, check water pressure, and update the compliance tag on the wall.
triage_reason_summary: Safety equipment compliance checks are managed under FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Perform a test activation of the safety shower, log the flow rate, and update the inspection tag.

title: Loading dock roller shutter door stuck half-open
description: The motorized rolling door at the warehouse loading dock is jammed at half-height. A delivery truck is arriving in 30 minutes, and they cannot unload large pallets through the narrow gap. The motor is unresponsive.
triage_reason_summary: Blocked loading dock blocking operations is a high-urgency facilities issue under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Dispatch maintenance with the manual override chain to raise the rolling door, and call the gate repair vendor.

title: Minor flooding in basement storage room after pipe leak
description: We noticed a puddle of water growing in the corner of basement storage room B2. It seems one of the low-pressure plumbing pipes is dripping from the joint. We need this fixed before our stored archives get wet.
triage_reason_summary: Plumbing leaks in storage rooms are handled by FC001 plumbing.
triage_recommended_next_action: Tighten the leaking pipe joint, wrap with sealing tape, and extract the water from the floor.

title: Bird nest blocking building ventilation exhaust grill
description: There is a bird nest built inside the external exhaust grill of our office ventilation duct on the Floor 18 balcony. It is restricting air flow and causing a stale odor to recirculate in the lobby.
triage_reason_summary: Building exterior maintenance and ventilation cleaning falls under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Safely relocate the nest if empty, clean the exhaust grill, and install a mesh wire guard to prevent future nesting.

title: Faded paint on disabled parking spots in visitor garage
description: The blue wheelchair markings on the visitor parking bay floor have faded completely, making it hard to identify them. Security had to ask several non-disabled drivers to relocate their cars. They need repainting.
triage_reason_summary: Parking striping and facilities marking is managed by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Schedule parking bay line repainting using high-durability floor marking paint.

title: Smoke detector low battery chirping sound in boardroom
description: The smoke detector in the main boardroom is making a loud, intermittent chirping beep every few minutes. It is very annoying during meetings. Can you send someone with a ladder to swap the battery?
triage_reason_summary: Safety alarms maintenance and battery replacement is managed under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Use a ladder to remove the smoke detector, replace the 9V backup battery, and test the alarm button.

title: Requesting safety adjustment of office security cameras in lobby
description: The camera near the lobby elevator has turned slightly and is now pointing at the wall rather than the elevator doors. We need maintenance to reposition it and tighten the mount.
triage_reason_summary: Physical security camera mounting adjustments are handled by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Reposition the security camera bracket, verify the video feed angle, and lock the mounting nut.

title: Water fountain filter replacement overdue in corridor 18
description: The indicator light on the water fountain near the elevator bank shows red, indicating the carbon filter needs replacement. The water flow is also very slow and has a slight metallic taste.
triage_reason_summary: Drinking water filter replacements and minor plumbing falls under FC001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the carbon filter cartridge in the water fountain and flush the line for 5 minutes.

title: Damaged drywall from chair bumps in meeting room 4C
description: The backing chairs in meeting room 4C have scraped against the drywall, creating several large dents and holes in the plaster. We need the drywall patched, sanded, and repainted to restore the room appearance.
triage_reason_summary: Drywall repairs and office interior wall touch-ups are handled by FC001 facilities.
triage_recommended_next_action: Patch the drywall dents with spackle, sand it flat, and paint with matching interior wall paint.
